name: sci-research
description: Five specialised multi-agent intelligence workflows plus project-scoped runtime setup, including offline monthly country-news synthesis and UK/Europe commercial opportunity monitoring.

interface.shortDescription: Daily and monthly news, opportunities, briefings, and reputation monitoring
interface.longDescription: Five specialised workflows: daily-news-intelligence for dated single-country reporting, monthly-news-intelligence for offline monthly synthesis from existing daily reports, daily-briefing for a multi-country branded Word document, reputation-track for company and executive risk alerts, and china-outbound-opportunity-briefing for UK economic signals, Chinese expansion into Europe, cross-border M&A, investment footprints, and Companies House entity changes. A setup skill installs the namespaced TOML custom agents into the active project.
defaultPrompt: Generate a daily news intelligence report for Japan
Create a monthly United Kingdom news report from existing daily reports
Create a branded briefing from daily news reports
Monitor a company for reputational risk
Create a UK and Europe opportunity briefing for Chinese enterprises
Set up the Sci-Research runtime in this workspace
